title: T-034 — UI: TEC-012 Item Detail page with tabs
prompt: Build /technical/items/[item_code] page (TEC-012, §6.5) with tabs: Overview / BOM / Allergens / Cost History / Routing / Supplier Specs / Lab Results / D365 Status. Each tab is a Server Component reading from corresponding API endpoint. Match prototype `material_detail_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:483-605. RED tests/ui/tec-012-item-detail.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-012-item-detail.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item detail page with 8 tabs and RBAC-aware action buttons (Edit, Deactivate).
pipeline_inputs.details: Use shadcn Tabs primitive. Edit button (TEC-013) reuses TEC-011 wizard in edit mode. Deactivate button opens TEC-081 modal. Tabs lazy-load via Suspense.
out_of_scope: Sub-tab implementations beyond stub (e.g., BOM tab uses T-037 child)
acceptance_criteria: Given the detail page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:483-605, then it shows the same 8 tabs in the same order, the same header layout with Edit/Deactivate actions, and uses shadcn Tabs primitive — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given user lacks technical.items.edit, when the page renders, then the Edit button is disabled or hidden.
Given user clicks Deactivate, when modal opens, then TEC-081 deactivate modal appears.
Given GET /items/:code returns 404, when page renders, then a not-found message replaces the body.
test_strategy: RED tests for tab structure + RBAC + 404 path.
risk_red_lines: Do not collapse tabs into a single page.
Do not expose private_jsonb to non-owner.
